## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have followed the code style guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have run `ruff check --fix` and `black .` to format my code
- [ ] I have run `mypy` for type checking
- [ ] I have not committed sensitive data (.env, secrets, etc.)
